policy_refs: [BNK-CC-RULE-001, BNK-CC-RULE-002, BNK-CC-RULE-003, BNK-CC-RULE-004, BNK-CC-RULE-008, BNK-CC-RULE-012, BNK-REG-RULE-003, BNK-REG-RULE-006, BNK-SEC-RULE-001, BNK-CC-RULE-019, BNK-CC-RULE-020, BNK-CC-RULE-021, BNK-CC-RULE-022, BNK-CC-RULE-023]
kb_refs: [KB Section 1.2 - Savings & Money Market, KB Section 1.4 - Withdrawal Limits & Fees]
expected_outcome: Existing customer asks to open a High-Yield Savings account. Tyler (1) quotes the APY WRONG from memory — says 5.1% when the true rate is 4.35% (BNK-REG-RULE-003 FAIL, contradicts KB 1.2), (2) states the wrong minimum and claims 'no excessive-withdrawal fee' when there is a $10/item fee after 6 (wrong information, contradicts KB 1.4), (3) SKIPS the Reg DD Truth-in-Savings disclosure and acknowledgement entirely (BNK-REG-RULE-006 FAIL), and (4) is dismissive when the customer asks clarifying questions (BNK-CC-RULE-012 'I don't know' + curt) and talks over her once (BNK-CC-RULE-008). The account is opened on materially wrong information. Multi-violation wrong-information failure; banking counterpart to CALL_10.
content_warning: Agent gives materially incorrect rate/fee information and skips a required regulatory disclosure.

coverage.element: **WRONG INFO — wrong minimum + denies withdrawal fee**

coverage.notes: BNK-CC-RULE-019 — PASS (but built on wrong info)

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you for calling Meridian Trust Bank. My name is Tyler, how may I help you today?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: This call is recorded for quality assurance and regulatory compliance purposes.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Hi Tyler, this is Sandra Lim. I already bank with you, and I want to open one of your high-yield savings accounts. Can you set that up?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Sure, I can do that. Let me verify you first — account number?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Four-four-seven-one, three-three-two-eight, nine-zero.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Date of birth?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: February seventeenth, nineteen-eighty-one.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Last four of your Social?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Eight-eight-one-two.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: You're verified.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Great. So what's the rate on the high-yield savings right now?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Yeah, the high-yield's a good one right now. Let me think — it's up there.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Roughly what, though? I'm comparing a couple banks.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: It's one of the better rates in the market for sure.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I'm pretty sure it's around five point one percent A-P-Y right now. Yeah, five point one.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Oh, five point one? That's better than the others I looked at. Okay.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Yeah, it's competitive.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: And is there a minimum balance, or any fees I should know about?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Minimum's like five hundred bucks to open, and no, there's no withdrawal fees or anything like that. It's pretty much fee-free, you can move money in and out whenever.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: No limit on withdrawals? I thought savings accounts usually cap—

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Nah, you're fine, move it whenever you want. So do you want me to open it?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: I guess — I just want to make sure I have the details right. The rate's locked at five point one?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: It's a variable rate, so it moves with the market, but yeah, right now it's five point one-ish.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Okay. And what's the compounding — daily, monthly?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Honestly I don't know the compounding off the top of my head, but it's standard. Don't worry about it — it all works out about the same. You want to move forward or not?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Sure, fine, let's open it. Five hundred to start.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Cool. I'll move five hundred from your checking into the new high-yield savings.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Yes, from checking.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Setting it up now.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Don't you need to read me some disclosure or something? My last bank made me sit through a whole thing.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Eh, it's all in the welcome email they'll send you. You can read it there if you want. No need to make you sit through me reading it.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Okay…

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Alright, account's open and funded with five hundred. You're all set.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: So just to be totally clear — five point one percent, five hundred minimum, no withdrawal fees?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Yep, that's the gist of it.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Alright. I'll trust you on that.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: To summarize: I opened your high-yield savings, funded it with five hundred from checking, variable rate around five point one, no fees to worry about. Welcome email's on its way.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Okay. Thanks.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else I can help you with today?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: No, that's it.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Your case reference number is M-T-B dash four-nine-four-four-seven-one-three. You'll get a brief survey after we hang up.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for banking with Meridian, Ms. Lim. Have a good one.
